sentimentalfuturist.net

Home » Privacy policy

Privacy Policy

  • Site owner: Silvia (sentimentalfuturist.net)
  • Location: Spain

This page explains what data is collected when you visit this site and why.

What I collect

  • Analytics: I use GoatCounter to see if visitors use mobile or desktop and what browsers they use. It does not use cookies, and no personal data is stored.
  • Guestbook: If you sign my guestbook, you choose to share your Name, Website URL, and Message. This data is stored by the service provider, Meadow.cafe, not by me directly.
    • You can check the Guestbook's terms and conditions here: Terms and Conditions
  • Embedded content: Some posts may contain embedded videos or media from third-party sites, such as:
    • Videos from YouTube: Privacy Policy

What I don't do

  • I don't sell or share your data.
  • I don't track you across other websites.
  • I don't use cookies for advertising.

Your rights

Under Spanish/EU law, you have the right to ask me to delete any data I hold about you or to ask how I use your information. You can send me an e-mail.

Page created: 01/05/2026, last updated: 01/05/2026
